patientid_keyword_port_verification: N/A (signal-wiring layer; per-patient firing requires downloaded genomic/clinical bytes)

findings.kill_chain_model: 2-of-3 concordance (CA-125 + HRD + ctDNA) per Harness C

HRD_BASELINE.enrichment: EGA metadata unblocks temporal stratification: 385 diagnosis vs 294 relapse samples enable HRD contrast across treatment timeline (was BAM-only before).

SIGNAL_CTDNA_MRD.zeta_source: Synapse MSK SPECTRUM (plasma modality if present)
SIGNAL_CTDNA_MRD.resolution: Synapse token now valid; scanned MSK SPECTRUM project — tissue WGS only, NO ctDNA/cfDNA/plasma resource exists. RES-OV-P0-006 remains architecturally unwired; MSK SPECTRUM cannot supply the modality.

KELIM_GENOTYPE_CONVERGENCE.zeta_source: SAS PDS serial markers + EGA genomics

CNA_AMPLIFICATION.resolution: CCNE1 amplification extracted from MSK cna.tsv: 6/40 samples high-level amp (=2). Wired as GenomicFeature node with 6 harbors_cna edges. TF2-SLOP-004 gap CLOSED for MSK cohort.

bugs_flagged.detail: SIGNAL_CTDNA_MRD=True accepted by Kill Chain but ctdna_status=NOT_WIRED_INTO_PROPHET. ctDNA HIGH does not raise Prophet probability.
bugs_flagged.zeta_fix: Synapse MSK plasma modality (UNKNOWN - pending valid token) to wire+calibrate

bugs_flagged.detail: detect_kelim_genotype_convergence reads kelim_obj.kelim (always None). Signal 6 never fires.
bugs_flagged.zeta_fix: Code fix (kelim->k) + SAS PDS real serial markers to validate firing

bugs_flagged.detail: Prophet checks CCNE1 somatic mutations only; CNA amplification path missing.
bugs_flagged.zeta_fix: Synapse cna.tsv/segments.seg provides CCNE1 CNA truth (READY_ON_TOKEN)

bugs_flagged.detail: MAPK_BYPASS class priority ordering flagged for review in deterministic classifier (BRAF/KRAS/NRAS logit genes). Verify class-priority does not mis-rank MAPK bypass vs HRD reversion.
bugs_flagged.zeta_fix: EGA+MSK genomic truth to empirically rank class priority instead of hardcoded order

findings.concordance_note: 2 signals (CA125_RISING, HRD_BASELINE) are WIRED. ctDNA accepted-not-wired; KELIM Signal6 dead; CCNE1 CNA gap; MAPK_BYPASS priority under review.
findings.session_update: CCNE1 CNA gap (TF2-SLOP-004) closed with real MSK data (6/40 amp). ctDNA verified non-wirable (no modality in MSK). Signals with data: 3/6 (was 2/6).

session3_sas_update.summary: CA-125 / serial-marker signals re-checked against extracted SAS tables.

CA125_RISING.reason: NO CA-125 column exists in ANY of the 23 extracted trials. CA-125 is an ovarian marker; extracted trials are solid tumors (breast/CRC/lung/etc.) - zero ovarian trials had loadable tables. Cannot wire CA-125 kinetics from this warehouse.
CA125_RISING.what_exists_instead: 17 trials DO have serial-lab (LB/adlb) tables with LBTEST/PARAM/AVAL/VISIT structure - the machinery is present, but not the CA-125 analyte.

KELIM_GENOTYPE_CONVERGENCE.reason: Serial-marker tables exist (17 trials) but not for ovarian CA-125/KELIM. RES-OV-P0-009 code fix still needed; SAS cannot supply ovarian serial CA-125.

CNA_AMPLIFICATION_CCNE1.note: Closed in Session 2 via MSK (6/40 amp). SAS adds nothing here (no ovarian CNA).

SIGNAL_CTDNA_MRD.note: MSK tissue-only; SAS has no ctDNA. Architectural gap RES-OV-P0-006 persists.

new_safety_signal_layer.detail: 118,859 graded adverse-event records now in graph (G1:32901 G2:14461 G3:9503 G4:1813 G5:289). Enables trial/arm-level toxicity signals - a NEW capability, though orthogonal to the ovarian kill-chain.

findings.honest_note: SAS extraction does NOT wire the ovarian kill-chain (wrong tumor types, no CA-125). It adds a large graded-AE safety layer. Prior 'WIRED via SAS' labels for CA-125 were aspirational and are corrected to NOT_FULFILLED.
